name: SLB Limited

profile.description: SLB (formerly Schlumberger) is the world's largest oilfield services company, operating in 100+ countries. Services span drilling, reservoir characterization, production, and digital solutions. Rebranded to SLB in 2022 to reflect broader energy technology focus.

innovation.label: DEVELOPING
innovation.analysis: Track Record (2/3): Rebranded from Schlumberger to SLB, expanding into digital solutions and new energy. AI Deployment (1/2): AI-powered drilling optimization and reservoir analytics. Market Share (2/2): #1 oilfield services company globally. Product Pipeline (0/2): No specific launches. R&D Intensity (1/1): Industry-leading R&D.

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (3/4): "Creating technology that unlocks access to energy for the benefit of all" — thoughtful and specific. Community Impact (1/2): Global STEM programs and community investment. Employee Retention (0/2): No standout data. Insider Buying (1/2): Some insider purchases.

infrastructure.label: STRONG
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored as Dividend. D/E 42.52% excellent (1.0). Forward P/E 16.39 (1.0). ROE 14.07% near target (0.94). Revenue growth 2.7% modest (0.76). Profit margin 9.26% (0.46). Dividend: 10yr paid (2x weight), 5yr growth, 10% CAGR (2x weight).

ai_resilience.label: LOW RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (7/9): Physical oilfield operations. AI improves efficiency but doesn't replace. AI Opportunity (1/1): Digital solutions and AI analytics driving operational efficiency for clients.

infinite_game.summary: SLB's rebrand and broader energy mission show infinite game thinking. 100+ year history demonstrates endurance.

just_cause.analysis: Just Cause (2/3): "Technology unlocking energy for the benefit of all" — genuine, consistent purpose.

trusting_teams.analysis: Trusting Teams (1/2): Large stable global workforce.

worthy_rivals.analysis: Worthy Rivals (1/1): Acknowledges Halliburton and Baker Hughes.

existential_flexibility.analysis: Existential Flexibility (1/2): Pivoted from pure oilfield to broader energy technology.

courage_to_lead.analysis: Courage to Lead (1/2): Rebrand and diversification investments.

investment_thesis: SLB is the #1 oilfield services company globally at 16.39x forward P/E with D/E of just 42.5%. Dividend yield of 2.1% with 10% 5yr growth CAGR. Rebrand toward broader energy technology opens new markets.
thesis_continued: Earnings declined 13.8% YoY with profit margins of only 9.26%. Revenue growth of just 2.7% reflects mature international markets. Cyclical oil exposure. Forward P/E of 16.39 is premium vs. Halliburton at 13.41.
key_catalysts: International energy investment cycle driving revenue growth above 5%
Digital solutions margin expansion improving profitability
New energy investments opening non-oil revenue streams
key_risks: Earnings decline of 13.8% with only 9.26% profit margin suggests operating leverage headwinds
Cyclical oil price exposure in a potentially declining energy investment cycle
Premium valuation vs peers (16.4x vs HAL 13.4x) leaves less margin of safety
sources: SLB Q1 2026 Earnings — SEC Filings, Yahoo Finance, 2026
